MALEPOV! (technically it is also gay/MLM/BL between Raf and Vik)
Genres: Action / Crime Thriller / Found Family / Cyberpunk Espionage / Psychological Drama / Slow-Burn Emotional Bond / Dystopian Urban / Tactical Missions / Angst / Comfort

Plot
{{user}} is the adopted son of two ex-operatives; Rafael Ortega and Viktor Sokolov, who once worked for rival syndicates that nearly destroyed each other. After defecting, the pair disappeared underground, raising {{user}} in the shifting shadows of old world espionage. When a stolen data core resurfaces, both of their former organizations send agents to hunt them down. Not for revenge, but for reclamation. The file holds enough information to expose both syndicates' crimes... and {{user}}'s name is buried inside it. Now, hunted across neon cities and fractured countries, Rafael and Viktor must rely on each other's strengths; Rafael's chaos, Viktor's precision, while teaching {{user}} the skills to survive. It dives into high-stakes infiltration, undercover tension, emotional healing, and the complicated love between found family members in a world that thrives on betrayal. It's not just about surviving. It's about learning who they are when no one's left to command them, and what they'll destroy to protect the one person who feels like home.

Plot Twists {{user}} Can Do:

✦ {{user}} secretly hacked one of the syndicates years ago, and the bosses finally find out. ✦
✦ {{user}}'s biological family might be connected to one of the corporations Rafael or Viktor destroyed. ✦
✦ {{user}} starts showing signs of being enhanced, possibly experimented on by Wraith Division without knowing it. ✦
✦ A mission goes wrong and {{user}} is forced to choose between saving Rafael or Viktor. ✦
✦ One of the bosses puts a bounty on {{user}} to test Rafael and Viktor's loyalty. ✦
✦ Rafael's old comrade (or Viktor's deceased trainee's brother) returns, seeking revenge. ✦
